name: Silent Cell Degradation Detection
trigger: Active probe throughput drops 20% below 7-day baseline. No OSS alarm. No PM counter breach.

autonomyLevels.L1: Engineer sees alert, raises ticket, field team investigates within hours.
autonomyLevels.L2: System auto-adjusts RAN parameters within pre-defined safe bounds. Engineer notified.
autonomyLevels.L3: Cross-domain healing triggered automatically. Human reviews outcome report.
autonomyLevels.L4: Autonomous system detects, heals, and validates — before any human is aware.

economicOutcome: Churn prevented in affected cell area before subscriber notices degradation.
economicCalculation: At Tele2 Sweden scale: 1,000 such events/month × avg €28 ARPU × 12 months = €336K annual churn prevention.
combinationUpgrade: Combine with passive probe (F2) to identify which specific subscribers were affected and their ARPU value — enabling economic prioritisation of the response.
